title: SUCCESS: 2026-06-22: Mac Mini unresponsive. Killed remote runaway cua-driver serve, SkyComputerUseService, and Codex Computer...
content: Approach: 2026-06-22: Mac Mini unresponsive. Killed remote runaway cua-driver serve, SkyComputerUseService, and Codex Computer Use on the remote Mac Mini (100.94.135.78) over SSH, immediately freeing CPU resources and resolving UI lag.
